item.title: Ball, Medicine Gym
item.description: A spherical instrument of significant density and heft, commonly employed in exercise routines to enhance muscular endurance and coordination. Typically observed in a state of restful contemplation on gym floors.

item.title: Generator, Diesel-Powered
item.description: An industrial workhorse known for its squat, formidable stance, designed to keep the lights on and the party going come what may. Esp. one viewed astern, in raking light.

item.title: Forklift, Heavy Container
item.description: A port-grade lifting machine built to hoist freight containers two and three high, distinguished by a cast counterweight so substantial the front forks read as a courtesy.

item.title: Skillet, Cast Iron
item.description: A culinary vessel of formidable heft and enduring thermal capabilities, noted for its ability to retain and evenly distribute heat across its ample surface area.

item.title: Typewriter, Vintage
item.description: A mechanical writing device from a bygone era, characterized by its sturdy, cast-iron frame and clack of proud keys, often repurposed today as atmospheric lighting fixtures.

item.title: Anvil, Blacksmith
item.description: A dense, industrial-grade tool upon which metal is worked, characterized by its substantial mass and steadfast refusal to budge without considerable effort. Frequently sighted with a patina of history and dust, typically under raking light.

item.title: Atlas Stone, Strongman
item.description: A spherical weight of imposing mass, employed in the sport of strongman competitions, often requiring Herculean effort to lift and maneuver. Its surface is characteristically rough, resembling a cosmic boulder that defies trivial engagement.

item.title: Teapot, Cast Iron
item.description: A vessel of formidable heft and undeniable presence, typically fashioned from cast iron and favored by tea enthusiasts with a penchant for endurance brewing.
